Why homeowners choose MTC

Better tiling isn't
a slogan here.

Most tiling problems are set in the first hour on site. Here's how we avoid them.

01 / SETOUT

Setout before a single tile is cut

Every room is measured and dry-laid first, so cuts fall evenly at doorways, niches and edges — not by accident, by plan.

02 / WATERPROOFING

Waterproofing done to code

Wet areas are membraned and tested to Australian Standards before a tile goes down. It's the part no one sees, and the part that matters most.

03 / COMMUNICATION

You'll know the price up front

Free, itemised quotes with no vague allowances. What we quote is what you're billed, and we tell you if that changes before it does.

04 / SITE CARE

Left cleaner than we found it

Grout sealed, edges caulked, site swept. We work in occupied homes and finished builds — it's treated that way every day.

What we tile

Four specialities.
No spreading thin.

We turn down general handyman tiling to stay sharp on the jobs below.

01

Bathrooms

Full wet-area strip-outs and new bathrooms — showers, niches, hobs and floor-to-ceiling wall tiling.

WET AREAMEMBRANE + FALLS
02

Splashbacks

Kitchen and laundry splashbacks cut tight around power points, shelving and cabinetry lines.

KITCHEN / LAUNDRYMITRED EDGES
03

Natural stone

Marble, travertine and porcelain stone-look slabs, book-matched and sealed for long-term care.

HONED / POLISHEDSEALED ON SITE
04

Pool surrounds

Slip-rated coping and surrounds set to fall away from the pool edge, built for our coastal climate.

SLIP-RATEDUV STABLE
